mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username as student_username, sp.real_name as student_real_name, sp.phone as student_phone, sp.email as student_email, sp.age as student_age, sp.gender as student_gender FROM coach_student_relations r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN student_profiles sp ON r.student_id = sp.user_id WHERE r.coach_id = #{coachId} AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, u.username as coach_username, cp.real_name as coach_real_name, cp.phone as coach_phone, cp.email as coach_email FROM coach_student_relations r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.coach_id = u.id LEFT JOIN coach_profiles cp ON r.coach_id = cp.user_id WHERE r.student_id = #{studentId} AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, u.username as student_username, sp.real_name as student_real_name, sp.phone as student_phone, sp.email as student_email, sp.age as student_age, sp.gender as student_gender FROM coach_student_relations r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN student_profiles sp ON r.student_id = sp.user_id WHERE r.coach_id = #{coachId} AND r.student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE coach_student_relations SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
